scope_summary: Fresh independent verifier accepted the scoped apps/web diagnostic API integration inside the mounted /profile/session flow after legal acceptance. The profile-session token remains in mounted React memory props/state only; diagnostic GET/PUT/POST use generated @finrhythm/api-client helpers; the UI sends only Q0, SA1-SA3 and Q1-Q3 and renders only safe N1 routePreview handoff fields. Full MVP-07, full MVP and human gates remain open.

commands.cmd: jq empty changed JSON artifacts and current verdict alias baseline
current worktree and backend/generated baseline scope check

findings.title: Mounted browser path is covered with independent smoke evidence.
evidence: Browser smoke used installed system Google Chrome.
Smoke ran against http://127.0.0.1:3404 and produced 34 screenshots.
The full handoff scenario included profile-session request/response, legal acceptance request/response, diagnostic GET, diagnostic PUT and diagnostic POST before the N1 handoff.
The smoke asserts the profile-session token is absent from URL and visible text.

findings.title: Diagnostic API usage is generated-client based.
evidence: apps/web/components/diagnostic-api-flow-screen.ts imports and uses fetchDiagnosticMeDraft, saveDiagnosticMeDraft and submitDiagnosticMeDraft from @finrhythm/api-client.
Focused source scans found no raw /api/v1/diagnostics URL, DIAGNOSTIC_ME_* path constant, XMLHttpRequest, sendBeacon or raw fetch call in the diagnostic component.

findings.title: Profile-session token remains memory-only for this web integration.
evidence: ProfileSessionEntryScreen stores profileSessionToken in React state and passes it as a prop to DiagnosticApiFlowScreen/ProfileContactScreen.
Focused scans found no token URL/query/hash/history transport, browser storage, cookies, cache, service worker or console logging patterns in changed production web files.
Browser smoke checked no raw token, invite code or employee registration id appears in URL, HTML or visible text for mocked profile-session scenarios.

findings.title: Diagnostic scope stays deliberately narrow.
evidence: Production diagnostic component defines only Q0, SA1-SA3 and Q1-Q3 UI/request state.
PUT body is built as separated q0.selectedOptionIds, selfAssessment and routingAnswers sections.
Focused scans found no Q4-Q28, C1-C10, final R1-R6, scoring, level, weak-zone report, HR insight, analytics/events, points or learning completion implementation in the diagnostic component.

findings.title: Safe handoff output is limited.
evidence: buildSafeDiagnosticHandoff accepts only SUBMITTED, routePreview=true, recommendedFirstLessonId=N1 and timestamps.
DiagnosticSubmittedHandoff renders only state, routePreview, recommendedFirstLessonId and timestamps plus N1/contact actions.
Browser smoke asserts Q0/SA/Q identifiers and attempt/scope ids are absent from the final handoff visible text.

findings.title: API/schema/generated-client dirty files are the preserved previous PASS baseline, not this scoped web builder slice.
evidence: Current worktree still contains apps/api and packages/api-client dirty files.
Immutable previous evidence for MVP-07-diagnostic-draft-api-001 lists those backend/API/Flyway/OpenAPI/generated-client files as the previous scoped PASS baseline.
Builder evidence and current scope check identify this web integration builder slice as apps/web production/test plus stage artifacts only.

findings.title: Docs sync and human gates are represented honestly.
evidence: Builder docs decision is NOOP_EXPECTED because this slice follows existing product methodology IDs, privacy boundaries, design patterns and previously documented backend/API boundary.
Stage evidence includes the required compact Mermaid flow.
status/evidence still had functional_passes=false and PENDING_FRESH_VERIFIER before this fresh verifier verdict.
status keeps mvp_07_complete=false, mvp_stage_complete=false and human_gates_open=true.

superseded_raw_notes: .agent/stages/mvp/raw/verifier-MVP-07-diagnostic-web-api-integration-001-20260514-fresh/guardrails/source-guardrail-scan.log contains an intentionally broad sensitive-data false positive for privacy/negative-context copy; it is superseded by sensitive-data-context-scan.log and refined-source-guardrail-scan.log.
.agent/stages/mvp/raw/verifier-MVP-07-diagnostic-web-api-integration-001-20260514-fresh/guardrails/status-gates.log contains a jq expression error; it is superseded by status-gates-rerun.log.
human_gates_open: Final financial correctness of diagnostic questions and explanations
Legal/privacy boundaries and real employee/customer data processing approval
Admin/support production access policy for sensitive diagnostic data
Design/accessibility QA on real mobile screens
notes: Verifier wrote only allowed verifier raw outputs plus verdict/problems artifacts and latest aliases.
No production code, tests, generated client, canonical docs, sprint contract, evidence aliases, status/progress/feature_list/publish_manifest or prior immutable proof refs were edited.
This PASS is scoped only to MVP-07-diagnostic-web-api-integration-001.
